name: Breadth-First Search
description: Graph traversal level by level using queue. O(V+E).
mermaid:
graph TD
    A1["Graph G\nStart vertex s"]
    B1["Q = queue with s\nvisited = s"]
    D1{"Q empty?"}
    C1["v = dequeue Q"]
    C2["For each neighbor u of v\nif not visited: enqueue mark visited"]
    F1["Return visited order\nor distances"]
    A1 --> B1
    B1 --> D1
    D1 -->|Yes| F1
    D1 -->|No| C1
    C1 --> C2
    C2 --> D1
    classDef red fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff,stroke:#c0392b
    classDef yellow fill:#ffd43b,color:#000,stroke:#f59f00
    classDef green fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    classDef lightblue fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff,stroke:#4dabf7
    classDef violet fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef lavender fill:#e6e6fa,color:#333,stroke:#b19cd9
    class A1 red
    class B1 yellow
    class C1,C2 green
    class F1 violet
    class D1 lavender
